description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Node.js Package that can be triggered manually or when a release is created. In an ubuntu-latest job with read permission to repository contents and write permission to packages, check out the code, set up Node.js 16.x with a custom registry and scope, modify package.json and README.md, install dependencies with npm ci, build the package, and publish it to GitHub Packages using the GITHUB_TOKEN from secrets.
